1791480.name: MelodyVerse
1791480.description:
A musical sandbox exploration game in an audio-reactive abstract universe. Listen to your music playlist while exploring stunning fractal patterns. Your music controls the simulation. Create and edit your own fractal worlds to explore. Adjust and tweak the visuals and simulation values to your liking. With a large range of customizable options as well as your music collection at your disposal, the possibilities are endless.


Audio-Reactive
The entire simulation reacts to the music that is currently playing, giving you a near-infinite series of visuals to explore depending on what you want to listen to. Enjoy the built-in songs or play your own music on your computer.

Free Roam
Freely explore different randomly generated fractal worlds that are connected to each other. Use your music to generate content.

Studio Mode
Studio mode allows you to create and edit fractal patterns. Camera options are also available as well for ease of recording videos.

Music is your universe. Explore a customizable sandbox universe driven by music. Create beautiful fractal patterns and dazzling lightshows as you navigate this unique, audio-reactive simulation. Play your own music and tweak the visuals as you desire.
